{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Progenitors
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Progenitors]] asked [[Eminence Core]] to read the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
